overall.description: A cinematic fly-through of a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring neon-lit alleys, holographic billboards, and towering skyscrapers. The camera moves steadily forward through narrow urban canyons, passing under transit structures and ascending toward distinctive circular architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial alley with overhead bridge structure

agents.ego_description: flying steadily forward through a narrow cyberpunk alley lined with vibrant neon signage

entered.detail: cluster of pink and cyan neon signs with Japanese characters and brand logos
vertical neon billboards and advertisements on the right building facade
green metal transit bridge with hazard stripes spanning the alley ahead
vents emitting white steam into the alleyway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a forward flight through a narrow cyberpunk commercial alley. Bright pink and cyan neon signs in Japanese and English adorn both sides, while a green bridge structure looms ahead. Steam rises from vents in the center of the corridor, creating atmospheric haze against the clear midday sky visible in gaps above.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit bridge underpass with hazard markings

events.description: passing underneath the green metal bridge structure with TENGU signage

agents.ego_description: flying under the bridge structure and emerging into the next section of the urban canyon

entered.detail: large cyan holographic display showing two human figures, one holding a weapon
yellow and black diagonal warning stripes on the bridge underside
circular neon sign with TENGU text and arrow indicators

segments.scene_description: The camera passes underneath the green transit bridge marked with hazard stripes and TENGU signage, transitioning from the initial alley into a slightly more open canyon. Steam clouds drift through the air as a large cyan holographic billboard becomes visible on the right, displaying two figures in futuristic attire.

scene_state.functional_zone: tight building canyon with massive holographic advertising

agents.ego_description: flying closely past the holographic billboard while maintaining forward trajectory through the building canyon

entered.detail: detailed industrial building exterior with metal panels and air conditioning units
concrete and metal building wall with mounted screens and pipes

segments.scene_description: Flying through an extremely narrow canyon between skyscrapers, the camera passes within close proximity to the massive cyan holographic billboard on the right. The detailed figures on the display become clearly visible as the camera moves past industrial building facades on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service alley between high-rise buildings

events.description: entering darker narrow corridor with reduced natural light

agents.ego_description: descending slightly while flying through a shadowed narrow passage between buildings

entered.detail: dark concrete and metal walls of the tight service corridor
large industrial ventilation grilles on the right building facade
distant view of the street level visible through the narrow gap between buildings

segments.scene_description: The environment darkens significantly as the camera enters a narrow service alley between towering buildings. Industrial ventilation grilles line the walls, and a distant view of the street level is visible far below. The lighting shifts to low artificial tones with minimal natural sunlight penetrating the deep urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper city levels with distinctive circular architecture

events.description: ascending past the red circular building with neon ring structure
opening up to wider city view with multiple skyscrapers visible

agents.ego_description: ascending rapidly to reveal the upper cityscape and distinctive red circular building

entered.detail: distinctive red cylindrical building with horizontal tiers and a glowing neon ring on top
circular red neon light structure atop the red building
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the urban canyon
distant cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and towers under clear blue sky

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends from the dark alley, revealing a distinctive red circular building with a glowing neon ring on the left. A skybridge spans the canyon ahead, while the view opens up to show the wider city skyline with numerous futuristic towers against the bright midday sky. The transition from enclosed darkness to open aerial view marks the final sequence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward flight through a dense cyberpunk corridor that transitions from a neon-lit commercial alley into a dark industrial chasm before ascending into a wide city skyline. It begins by gliding through a narrow alley adorned with pink and cyan signs and rising steam, moving steadily toward a green transit bridge marked with hazard stripes. As the camera passes under the bridge, the space opens slightly to reveal a massive cyan holographic billboard of two futuristic figures, which looms close as the flight continues between towering skyscraper facades. The environment then plunges into significant darkness upon entering a deep service alley lined with industrial ventilation grilles, where natural light vanishes in favor of low artificial tones. Finally, the camera ascends sharply from the shadows, passing a red circular building with a glowing neon ring to reveal a sprawling aerial vista of futuristic towers under a bright midday sky.
